text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Valentine's Day, and the academy is humming
with anticipation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While other students typically hesitate to
approach members of the student council, more
than a few seem to have been emboldened by the
occasion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their gifts are piled high by the wall of the
student council office.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now there's a familiar sight. Already that time of
year again, is it?
choice_data_list: Is all that Valentine's Day chocolate?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Technically speaking, not all of it is chocolate.
There are other kinds of confections, too, and
some assorted knickknacks...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But in the sense you mean, yes. They are all gifts
for the student council.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We are well known. The higher our profile among
the students, the larger our pool of potential
admirers.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I expect their admiration is more akin to that for
celebrities than anything else.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Besides, at their age, the younger students desire
someone to look up to.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And who could fit that role better than the
Emperor?
choice_data_list: You're impressively objective about it all.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
On the contrary, I am a young Umamusume like
any other. I might try to take a neutral view, but I
cannot help but be flattered.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I should add, all of these gifts were left in front of
the student council office rather than placed in
our hands directly.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Those who left them might have been too
intimidated to address us directly, but that only
makes their courage all the more admirable.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
They are pure and earnest to the core. One
cannot help but feel affection.
choice_data_list: You're smiling from ear to ear.
You're smiling from ear to ear.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But of course. How could I not, when speaking of
our precious students?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now, I must see to sorting through these
chocolates.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This may take some time. You might want to
come back later...
choice_data_list: I can give you a hand.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: No, I couldn't possibly...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Well, you are my confidant. I suppose no one would mind.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Very well—your aid is much appreciated. Shall we
begin?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
First, we'll arrange the store-bought goods by
sell-by date. These boxes should come in useful...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Well, I think that just about does it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. With your help, it took almost no time
at all.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Let's take a break, shall we? Would you open that
drawer over there?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open the drawer to find a rectangular box
nestled within. It appears to contain a bar of
chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A token of my appreciation. I believe it should go
well with coffee.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Not to boast, but I have seen more Valentine's
Day gifts than anyone else in the academy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have become familiar with enough brands of
chocolate to choose one that best suits your
tastes.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Why not try it now? I can vouch for its quality.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a bite and the rich flavor of cocoa fills my
mouth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Only later, when I try to track down the brand
myself, do I learn just how expensive it is...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Still, this does pose a quandary.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You've done so much to help me today, but I
have nothing to offer you in return.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Like the telephone said to the angry ruler... this
calls for drastic measures.
choice_data_list: (I've got a bad feeling about this.)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I am left with no choice but to confess my
deepest secret.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You might find this difficult to believe, but... I can
do magic.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You might think I've gone mad, but it's the truth.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Royal blood can grant magical powers. I'm sure
you've heard the stories.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: What if I said my family was one such line?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf's eyes are too intense for this to
be a joke.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Let me prove my powers to you now.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Close your eyes and hold out your hand.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Yes, good. Just like that. Now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Plop.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You may open your eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A present adorned with a golden ribbon sits in my
palm.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Happy Valentine's Day, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This chocolate is my gift to you. I hope you find it
to your liking.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Heh. Perhaps that was a little too theatrical.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm used to receiving chocolate, but far less
accustomed to giving it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I fear I got a little carried away...
choice_data_list: So you were lying about the magic?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Not at all. I cast a spell on the chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A spell of good cheer for you to enjoy as you
take a bite.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sure enough, when I take a bite, I can't help
breaking into a smile.
